title: CodeCatalyst Hackathon
description: A 24-hour hackathon to build innovative solutions for smart cities. Bring your team!

title: AI in Healthcare Summit
description: Explore the latest breakthroughs in artificial intelligence applied to modern healthcare.

title: Web3 & Blockchain Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop on building decentralized applications (dApps) using Solidity.

title: Cybersecurity Capture The Flag
description: Compete against other teams to find vulnerabilities and capture flags in our custom sandbox.

title: Startup Pitch Competition
description: Pitch your tech startup idea to a panel of industry experts and investors.

title: Game Development with Unity
description: Learn the basics of creating 3D games using the Unity engine in this interactive session.
